banner.description: Not millions — so you'd panic and hide behind skepticism. Not twenty bucks — so you'd snort with condescension. Just enough to make you think: "Hmm… what if?"

dialog.title: In about a week. Maybe two. Or maybe — who the hell knows when.
dialog.subtitle: We're going to give away a thousand greens. There will be announcement — you need to keep up.
dialog.description: Here's the thing: a thousand bucks isn't a gift or "luck." It's something you take. And to take it, you need to be ready. So practice. When the room appears, there won't be time to figure things out. There will only be a choice — take it or tell yourself once again that you were "almost there."
